w:r.w:t: L will make a team and team leader and tell them that tomorrow we will work on a project of making Ort family tree.
Pupils will paste pictures of ort characters on a tree (Pupils will work in a team and team leader will give instructions that where they have to paste pictures. IL will observe them)
Pupils will pick the pictures of fruits and tell about its Color and taste.
Pupils will bring their favorite seasonal fruit in lunch and eat it.
IL will explain the activities of
.IL will mention day and date on top of the
age #26. IL will mention the day and date on top of the page and check at the end
Send notice in diaries “bring Grapes or grape juice in lunch”
IL to do a 5 min warm up with the pupils.
. While the music is playing, pupils move in
(walking, skipping, or marching) around the mats
. More than one pupil may hide behind a mat. Pupils may
lead the pupil to stretch and bend their arms and legs and cool their bodies down before going back to the class.
Where is the tomb of Allama Iqbal?
The tomb of Allama Iqbal is in Lahore.
When do we fast? (Explain the meaning of Fast).
Apple, Banana, Orange, Grapes and Watermelon.
